column1: # Living individuals across 25 patches (sub-5m saplings not in ind output). Per-individual
# crown/leaf/sapwood reconstructed from the ind CSV via LPJmL-FIT allometry; fpar_leafon =
# per-PATCH vertical layered Beer-Lambert light share (getfpar.c port
# cell FAPAR(leafon) = sum(fpar_leafon)/25. gpp_ind/npp_ind = ind-CSV NPP (agpp+=npp bug);
# transp_ind = per-individual annual transpiration (mm/yr). See scripts/extract_fdiff_individuals.py.
